retrieved_result: Master of Science in Athletic Training About Athletic Training The Master of Science in Athletic Training (MSAT) is a competitive entry CAATE accredited professional level program. The MSAT program is for students who wish to pursue athletic training credentials by the Board of Certification (BOC) and pursue a career as a Certified Athle
